title: Version 1.2
text:
This document presents univariate and bivariate tables of environmental attitudes among Round 11 respondents of the European Social Survey (2023-24)



1.2 8 March 2026: Fixed sample size in section 4, switch to unrecoded left-right scale
1.1 8 March 2026: Initial version
